asset_categories.description: SAP (S/4HANA, SuccessFactors), Microsoft 365, Salesforce, ServiceNow, GitLab, Snowflake, Splunk, Trellix XDR, Cortex XSOAR, and other internal or client-facing business applications
Non-SCADA physical infrastructure: datacenters, servers, storage, virtualisation, physical security systems
Network devices and monitoring: Palo Alto NGFW/Prisma, Cisco Catalyst switches and WAN edge routers, ESRI mapping/GIS systems, network management platforms
Physical hardware and remote management for operational technology: industrial control systems, PLCs, RTUs, substation automation, field devices, OT networks
Fallback category for threats that do not clearly match any other team. General IT support, unclassified endpoints, or ambiguous advisories.
